Red Dragon
Fang Picker

Triggers: Once in a while

Jaws
A random enemy is bitten by huge jaws. That enemy is stunned for 4 sec. All shields, damage-reducing effects, and buffs are removed from the enemy, and no buffs can be cast on the target for 4 sec. Also during this time, the target takes 48000 pure damage every 0,5 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
